title: BlockLine
description: BlockLine - compiler for block-based programming language
body:
BlockLine - compiler for block-based programming language

To use the compiler, build code from blocks, stand near the beginning of the line and write the command "/blockline" in the chat


Blocks and their values ​​for the compiler:

ProgramStart - Diamond Block
Program End - Bedrock
Logical True - Obsidian
Logical False-Glass
Print - Cobblestone
Create Variable - Sandstone


For more information about blocks, use the command "/blockline tutorial"

Video: [BlockLine](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aRgCcrNB378&ab_channel=C1cDez)
